name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.1.0 — LLM prompt optimizer + auto-verify by stakes (T0-T4) + auto-handoff on closure + honesty selector (brutal/grounded/soft) + agent-swarm default-on + hygiene cycle + cross-family cascade-then-jury review (judge-panel) + hallucination detector + research-first mode + fish-swarm orchestration + session handoff codification. Socratic coaching, persona detection, context management, prompt improvement, and Defense-in-Depth verification across any AI.
